privileged_info_summary: Maria Gonzalez is a female patient created during Bahmni environment seeding with birth year 1972 and DOB 1972-06-15. However, the patient's actual identifier in the seeded system is BAH000003 (not BAH000002 as claimed in task metadata), based on the seed_bahmni.py assignment logic where Maria Gonzalez is the second patient in the PATIENT_DATA list. The file to be uploaded, external_lab_report.jpg, is synthetic and generated by ImageMagick at /home/ga/Documents/external_lab_report.jpg during task setup. It contains a fake lab report with test results (HbA1c: 5.8%, Status: Normal). All patient names are derived from US Census Bureau public domain names data. All data in this task is synthetic.
